question: How do you apply day visual scanning techniques?

options.text: Avoid looking directly at an object for no more than 2-3 seconds.
Using upward and downward movements to scan, regularly spaced eye movements which bring successive areas of sky into the central (fovea) visual field.
Do not move the body and head to see around physical obstructions.
Perform a series of short, regularly spaced eye movements which bring successive areas of sky into the central (fovea) visual field.
